sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92183" key="r(apismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥαπ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">striking, beating</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
